summary: v50.8.0 WhatsApp Truck Payment & Truck Owner Feature Testing Complete. All backend API endpoints working correctly (7/7 tests passed). Frontend WhatsApp buttons visible in Truck Payments (3 buttons), Truck Owner (2 buttons with 'WhatsApp' text), and Leased Truck tab (0 buttons - expected as no leases exist). Version 50.8.0 confirmed in footer and What's New dialog shows correct changelog.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Both endpoints return 400 error when truck_no is missing or empty
VERIFIED: WhatsApp Send icon button visible in Truck Payments tab Actions column (data-testid='truck-wa-*')
VERIFIED: WhatsApp button with text visible in Truck Owner tab Actions column (data-testid='owner-wa-*')
VERIFIED: Leased Truck tab has WhatsApp button code but no leases exist to display it
VERIFIED: What's New dialog shows v50.8.0 changelog with WhatsApp Truck Payment & Truck Owner features
VERIFIED: Changelog mentions all 3 new features: Truck Payment, Truck Owner, Leased Truck WhatsApp buttons
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing truck payment data for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v50.8.0 WhatsApp features complete. Backend endpoints /api/whatsapp/send-truck-payment and /api/whatsapp/send-truck-owner working. Frontend has Send icon buttons in Truck Payments and WhatsApp text buttons in Truck Owner. Leased Truck tab has the button code but requires creating a lease to see it. WhatsApp integration uses 360Messenger API with settings pre-configured.

send_truck_payment_validation.details: Returns 400 when truck_no is missing or empty

send_truck_owner_validation.details: Returns 400 when truck_no is missing or empty

frontend_truck_payments_whatsapp_button.details: Found 3 WhatsApp Send icon buttons in Truck Payments tab with data-testid='truck-wa-*'

frontend_truck_owner_whatsapp_button.details: Found 2 WhatsApp buttons in Truck Owner tab with data-testid='owner-wa-*'

frontend_leased_truck_whatsapp_button.details: Button code exists but no leases to display (expected - 0 active leases)

whats_new_changelog.details: What's New dialog shows v50.8.0 with WhatsApp Truck Payment & Truck Owner changelog
